features.name: Hold Breath
features.description: The plesiosaurus can hold its breath for 1 hour.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Striker - Aquatic dinosaur with extended reach
tactical_info.positioning: Uses 10 ft reach to attack from deeper water
tactical_info.damage_output: 11 piercing per hit with superior positioning
tactical_info.key_abilities: Extended breath holding (1 hour), 10 ft reach bite
tactical_info.weaknesses: Slower on land, relies on aquatic advantage
tactical_info.synergies: Dominates water-land interfaces, excellent for coastal encounters
